input.prompt:
I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

input.initialPrompt:
I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

data.content:
Here's a MAUI `CollectionView` with single selection and pull-to-refresh:

## XAML

```xml
<RefreshView Command="{Binding RefreshCommand}"
             IsRefreshing="{Binding IsRefreshing}">
    <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Items}"
                    SelectionMode="Single"
                    SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedItem}"
                    SelectionChangedCommand="{Binding SelectionChangedCommand}">
        <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
            <DataTemplate x:DataType="models:Item">
                <Grid Padding="10">
                    <Label Text="{Binding Name}" FontSize="16" />
                </Grid>
            </DataTemplate>
        </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
    </CollectionView>
</RefreshView>
```

## ViewModel Bindings

| Property | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `Items` (`ObservableCollection<Item>`) | Data source |
| `SelectedItem` (`Item`) | Tracks selected item; clear after navigation to allow reselection |
| `IsRefreshing` (`bool`) | Controls the refresh spinner |
| `RefreshCommand` (`IAsyncRelayCommand`) | Calls API, sets `IsRefreshing = false` when done |
| `SelectionChangedCommand` (`IAsyncRelayCommand`) | Navigates to detail page |

## ViewModel (using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm)

```csharp
[ObservableProperty]
private Item? _selectedItem;

[ObservableProperty]
private bool _isRefreshing;

public ObservableCollection<Item> Items { get; } = new();

[RelayCommand]
private async Task RefreshAsync()
{
    var data = await _apiService.GetItemsAsync();
    Items.Clear();
    foreach (var item in data)
        Items.Add(item);
    IsRefreshing = false;
}

[RelayCommand]
private async Task SelectionChangedAsync()
{
    if (SelectedItem is null) return;

    await Shell.Current.GoToAsync(
        $"{nameof(DetailPage)}",
        new Dictionary<string, object> { ["Item"] = SelectedItem });

    SelectedItem = null; // reset so user can re-select same item
}
```

**Key points:**
- `RefreshView` wraps the `CollectionView` — it provides the pull gesture.
- Set `IsRefreshing = false` when your async work finishes to dismiss the spinner.
- Null out `SelectedItem` after navigation; otherwise selecting the same item again won't fire the command.
- `SelectionMode="Single"` limits selection to one item at a time.
data.reasoningText: The user is asking for a .NET MAUI CollectionView example with single item selection and pull-to-refresh, along with XAML and ViewModel binding explanations. This is a general programming question that doesn't require any tool usage - I can answer directly from knowledge.
